title: Question bank #2 end-to-end (math, low risk)
context: Following the pilot bank (pilot-009), the second bank targets a math OER unit to deepen pipeline experience with numeric and algebraic item types (numeric with tolerance, single/multi MCQ for concepts, cloze for fill-in steps). Exporters (qti-010, moodle-011) must be available so the bank can be exported to QTI 3.0 and Moodle for real platform adoption. Authoring effort for this bank is logged in the outcome ledger as a baseline for M2 throughput reduction.
objective: Author and deliver a complete, adopted question bank aligned to a math OER unit, passing all gates and exported to QTI 3.0 and Moodle, with authoring effort logged.
acceptanceCriteria: Source passed gate-003 (permits derivatives; no PII) with gate artifact committed.
Coverage >= 90% of the unit's stated learning objectives as recorded in the blueprint.
Items authored in canonical model with correct keys, rationales (overall + per-distractor), scoring, alignment, and accessibility metadata.
CI machine gate green: schema valid + grader self-test 100% + quality and accessibility lints pass.
Human sign-offs recorded: SME (key + rationale), license, accessibility, bias.
Bank exported to QTI 3.0 and Moodle (GIFT/XML) using the M1 exporters.
Bank adopted by a beneficiary with adoption evidence artifact committed (outcomes/<bank-id>.json).
Per-bank authoring + review effort logged in the outcome ledger as a baseline for M2 reduction.
output: A complete, adopted math question bank in canonical JSON + QTI 3.0 + Moodle GIFT/XML exports, with gate artifact, human sign-offs, and adoption evidence committed.
